_comment: Thunder Toad (雷蟾) — Renegade Immortal. Canon confidence: 5/5. Prime Directive: this beast exists objectively whether the player has the perception to recognize it.
name: Thunder Toad

canonical.appearance: Bloated toad 1-2m, skin crackles with blue-white thunder patterns, throat sac glows during storms. Deceased by Wang Lin.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: Thunder Toad core refines Thunder Tribulation Pills; enhances thunder-attribute techniques
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: Wang Lin killed the Thunder Toad in Fire Burn Country and harvested its core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
